---
title: "PATH40060-Precision Oncology - Group Project
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-22"
---

```{r}

# Define gene list

genes_of_interest <- c( 
  "VEGFA", "CA9", "BIRC5", "SLC2A1", "ADM", "PDK1",
  "PROM1", "CD44", "SOX2", "NANOG", "POU5F1",  # OCT4 = POU5F1
  "BDNF", "NLGN3", "DAB2IP"
)

# Load cBioPortal dataset

data <- read.delim(
  "/Users/al/PATH40060-Precision Oncology/data_mrna_seq_v2_rsem_zscores_ref_all_samples.txt",
  comment.char = "#",
  header = TRUE,
  sep = "\t",
  check.names = FALSE,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Extract gene names

if ("Hugo_Symbol" %in% colnames(data)) { 
  dataset_genes <- data$Hugo_Symbol
} else {
  dataset_genes <- rownames(data)
}

# Clean gene names

dataset_genes <- toupper(trimws(dataset_genes))
genes_of_interest <- toupper(genes_of_interest)

# Find genes

genes_found <- genes_of_interest[genes_of_interest %in% dataset_genes] 
genes_missing <- setdiff(genes_of_interest, dataset_genes)

# Output results

cat("Genes found:\n") 
print(genes_found)

cat("\nGenes missing:\n")
print(genes_missing)
```
```{r}
hypoxia_genes <- c("VEGFA", "CA9", "BIRC5", "SLC2A1", "ADM", "PDK1") # Define groups of genes
stemness_genes <- c("PROM1", "CD44", "SOX2", "NANOG", "POU5F1")
invasion_genes <- c("BDNF", "NLGN3", "DAB2IP")
```

```{r}

# Remove missing gene symbols

data <- data[!is.na(data$Hugo_Symbol) & data$Hugo_Symbol != "", ]

# Remove duplicate genes

data <- data[!duplicated(data$Hugo_Symbol), ]

# Set rownames

rownames(data) <- data$Hugo_Symbol

# Extract expression matrix (remove annotation columns)

expr <- data[, !(colnames(data) %in% c("Hugo_Symbol", "Entrez_Gene_Id"))]

# Convert to numeric matrix

expr <- as.matrix(expr)
mode(expr) <- "numeric"
```


```{r}

# Convert sample IDs to patient IDs

expr_patient_ids <- substr(colnames(expr), 1, 12)

# Replace column names

colnames(expr) <- expr_patient_ids
```


```{r}

# Load clinical data

clinical <- read.delim(
  "/Users/al/PATH40060-Precision Oncology/data_clinical_patient.txt",
  comment.char = "#",
  header = TRUE,
  sep = "\t",
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE,
  fill = TRUE,
  quote = ""
)
```


```{r}

# Load survival data

clinical$OS_MONTHS <- as.numeric(clinical$OS_MONTHS)

clinical$OS_STATUS <- ifelse(
  grepl("DECEASED", clinical$OS_STATUS, ignore.case = TRUE),
  1, 0
)

# Remove missing survival

clinical <- clinical[!is.na(clinical$OS_MONTHS) & !is.na(clinical$OS_STATUS), ]
```


```{r}

# Match samples

common_ids <- intersect(colnames(expr), clinical$PATIENT_ID)

# Check overlap

cat("Number of matched patients:", length(common_ids), "\n")

# Subset

expr <- expr[, common_ids]
clinical <- clinical[match(common_ids, clinical$PATIENT_ID), ]
```


```{r}

# Extract genes

all_genes <- unique(c(hypoxia_genes, stemness_genes, invasion_genes))
all_genes <- intersect(all_genes, rownames(expr))

expr_subset <- expr[all_genes, , drop = FALSE]
```


```{r}

# Build processed dataset

expr_df <- as.data.frame(t(expr_subset))
expr_df$PATIENT_ID <- rownames(expr_df)

merged_data <- merge(expr_df, clinical, by = "PATIENT_ID")
```


```{r}

# Checking for processed dataset

cat("\nFinal dataset dimensions:\n")
print(dim(merged_data))

cat("\nGenes in analysis:\n")
print(colnames(merged_data)[colnames(merged_data) %in% all_genes])

```

```{r}

# Keep only genes that exist in dataset for hypoxia group

hypoxia_genes <- intersect(hypoxia_genes, colnames(merged_data))
```
